title: ageratina espinosarum var. espinosarum
intro: Ageratina espinosarum var. espinosarum, also known as Mexican mountain mint, is a plant species in the mint family, native to Mexico and Central America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Ageratina espinosarum var. espinosarum include relieving symptoms of colds and flu, reducing inflammation and pain, and improving digestive health. Ageratina espinosarum var. espinosarum can be prepared as a tea or tincture, and its essential oil is also used in herbal preparations, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
